channel.title: Engineering on Nemanja Tomic - Blogging About Tech
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering on Nemanja Tomic - Blogging About Tech

item.title: How to Think About Technical Debt Without Panic
item.description: Technical debt becomes easier to manage when it is treated as a portfolio of trade-offs instead of a moral failure.

item.title: Why Clear Documentation Still Matters
item.description: Documentation is not busywork; it is part of the interface between systems, teams, and future decisions.
